headline: Ladenburg Lifts PT on Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) – Here’s Why
summary: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ:HST) is one of the top wonderful stocks to buy now. Ladenburg lifted the price target on Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ:HST) to $28 from $25 on June 10, maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The firm told investors in a research note that the company’s RevPAR growth has […]
